title: Cloudgear [bbce]
description: Fabric 1.20.1 skyblock modpack centered on create, for the Beep Boop Central Minecraft Server
body:
A fabric 1.20.1 skyblock modpack centered on create, for the Beep Boop Central Minecraft Server.

Start with nothing but water, lava, dirt, and a tree, and build up to a floating factory! Check out [Sky Void Additions](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sky-void-additions) for the added ways to obtain things. With Create (+addons) to make more automation possible, and Spyglass Astronomy for gazing into the void.

Reccomended to play with [Bayis create sykblock loot table](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bayis-create-sykblock-loot-table) for eaisier ways to get andesite and zinc.

---

### Modlist:

#### Main Content Mods:

 - botania
 - create fabric
 - create: new age
 - create: pizza
 - create: steam ‘n’ rails
 - origins
 - sky void additions
 - skyblock - standard
 - spyglass astronomy

#### The Rest:

 - another furniture
 - apugli
 - better clouds
 - clear void
 - cloth config api
 - create deco
 - create: copycats+
 - create: origins
 - emi
 - emi addon: extra mod integrations

 - emi trades
 - el & l’s dyes
 - enhanced block entities
 - fabric api
